entities.name: Market fundability
entities.context: How markets assess a candidate's hirability based on established signals of competence

entities.name: Professional acceptability
entities.context: Market's willingness to accept a candidate for a role

entities.name: Geometric distance
entities.context: Metaphor for how far a career move is from one's established core

entities.name: Career core
entities.context: An individual's established base of experience and competence that anchors transitions

entities.name: Degrees of freedom
entities.context: Number of simultaneous changes (domain and role) attempted in a career pivot

entities.name: Information asymmetry
entities.context: Knowledge gap between candidate and employer that increases with multi-axis shifts

entities.name: Domain
entities.context: One axis of career movement representing industry or field (e.g., EdTech to Fintech)

entities.name: Role
entities.context: One axis of career movement representing function (e.g., Marketing to Product)

entities.name: Sequential vectors
entities.context: Strategy of treating career moves as a series of single-axis shifts rather than one large jump

entities.name: Single-axis shift
entities.context: Moving one variable at a time while the career core anchors the transition

entities.name: Multi-axis shift
entities.context: Simultaneous changes that remove the anchor and appear indistinguishable from lack of experience

entities.name: Careerspan
entities.context: V's company and the domain context for this career strategy framework

relationships.context: Fundability is a function of geometric distance from career core
Acceptability is a function of geometric distance from career core
More degrees of freedom increases information asymmetry between candidate and employer
The core anchors the new variable in a single-axis transition
Sequential single-axis moves maintain market trust and fundability
Domain change represents one degree of freedom in career pivots
Role change represents one degree of freedom in career pivots
Framework for coaching candidates on career strategy
